view.title: Named Territory {hostname}
view.name: True Name:
view.allGoodNoErrors: All is well! No hexes in contact registry!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Art thou certain thou wishest to resend the welcoming stone?
view.welcomeEmailResent: The welcoming stone hath been resent. Check thy inbox.

order.findDomain: Find thy territory and check its availability.
order.premiumAvailable: Huzzah! Thy territory {domain} is available and it is a premium realm. Automatic registration is forbidden. Send a stone to {email} if thou wouldst purchase this realm for {cost} per year.
order.premiumTaken: Alas! Thy territory {domain} is already claimed! Dost thou already own it? Thou canst transfer it, and it is a premium realm. Automatic registration is forbidden. Send a stone to {email} if thou wouldst purchase this realm for {cost} per year.
order.available: Huzzah! Thy territory {domain} is available! Thou canst register it for {cost}. Renewal gold shall be {renewal}.
order.taken: Alas! Thy territory {domain} is already claimed! Dost thou already own it? Thou canst transfer it for {cost}. Renewal gold shall be {renewal}.
order.agreeToTerms: Bind thyself to the covenant terms
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: The binding shall automatically renew after every year at {cost} until dispelled.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: By marking this rune, thou dost acknowledge that thou art conjuring a subscription product that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is billed to the payment rune thou dost provide today. If thou dost wish to dispel thy auto-renewal, thou mayest access the patron portal (Here) select the enchanted service and click the Dispel portal or send a stone to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By marking the rune and clicking Place My Conjuration below, thou dost also acknowledge thou hast read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.agreeCheckbox: I have read the terms above and I bind myself.
order.searchingDomain: Patience, apprentice! Scrying for this territory name.

nameservers.title: Territory Name-Binders
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Suggested name-binders have been applied. Click Transmute to inscribe.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: Thou art about to banish thy territory name-binder.

eppCode.title: Dispatch EPP Rune via Sending Stone
eppCode.confirmMessage: Art thou certain thou wishest to dispatch EPP Rune to the registered ethereal address?

whois.title: Whois Veil
whois.renewalNote: Whois Veil is renewed every 12 moon cycles from the date of enchantment. Whois Veil addon renewal gold is {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Whois Veil is not available for this territory type.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Whois Veil is currently enchanted for {hostname}.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Contact Veil conceals the identity of a Registrant when a mage performs a WHOIS scrying on that Registrant's territory.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: The benefit of having Contact Veil is that the Registrant's identity, including home realm address, sending crystal number, and ethereal address, is shielded from dark mages, identity thieves and tricksters.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: When Registrants enchant the Contact Veil service, masked contact inscriptions appear in the public WHOIS registry.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Contact veil is available for {cost} per territory per year.
whois.enableNow: To enchant Contact Veil for thy Territory, Place Conjuration Now.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Whois Veil gold: {cost} per year. Art thou certain thou wishest to place this conjuration?
whois.enableMessage: Thy territory {hostname} hath a paid whois veil addon that is not yet enchanted. Wouldst thou like to enchant it now?
whois.disableMessage: Thy territory {hostname} Whois Veil addon is currently enchanted. Art thou certain thou wishest to hex and dispel it?
whois.whoisDisabled: Whois Veil hath been hexed and dispelled.

whoisToggle.title: Whois Veil Addon
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Thy territory {domain} Whois Veil addon is Enchanted
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Thy territory {domain} Whois Veil addon is Hexed
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Art thou certain thou wishest to Enchant Whois Veil?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Art thou certain thou wishest to Hex and Dispel it?

lock.title: Territory Lock/Unbind
lock.activateLock: Dost thou wish to Activate territory lock?
lock.inactivateLock: Dost thou wish to Inactivate territory lock?

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Inscriptions
dnssec.enterDigest: Enter Value of Digest (Must not be greater than {max} Characters)
dnssec.unableToParse: Unable to parse DS record format.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: This shall dismiss all DNSSEC records for this territory.
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Prithee fill in at least one DNSSEC record.

renew.title: Renew
renew.tip1: Territory should be renewed on or before its fading date.
renew.tip2: If territory hath faded, it may have a grace period from fading date to renew.
renew.tip3: Enchant Whois Veil to conceal thy Contact Registry when a mage performs a WHOIS scrying on that Registrant's territory.
renew.alreadyRenewed: Thou hast already renewed thy territory!
renew.payExistingInvoice: To renew thy territory, prithee settle the existing debt scroll.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Total gold: {cost}. Art thou certain thou wishest to place this renewal conjuration?

transfer.title: Transfer Aura
transfer.notATransfer: This territory is not a transfer.
